fields.label: Extinct
fields.description: Species no longer exists anywhere in the world

fields.label: Extinct in the Wild
fields.description: Species survives only in captivity or cultivation

fields.label: Critically Endangered
fields.description: Species faces extremely high risk of extinction

fields.label: Endangered
fields.description: Species faces very high risk of extinction

fields.label: Vulnerable
fields.description: Species faces high risk of extinction

fields.label: Near Threatened
fields.description: Species is close to qualifying as threatened

fields.label: Least Concern
fields.description: Species does not qualify for a threatened category

fields.label: Data Deficient
fields.description: Insufficient data to assess risk of extinction

fields.label: Critically Endangered, Possibly Extinct
fields.description: Species is critically endangered globally and may already be extinct in the Northen Territory

fields.label: Endangered, Extinct in the NT
fields.description: Species is endangered globally but extinct in the Northern Territory

fields.label: Endangered, Extinct in the Wild in the NT
fields.description: Species is endangered globally and extinct in the wild in the Northern Territory

fields.label: Vulnerable, Extinct in the NT
fields.description: Species is vulnerable globally but extinct in the Northern Territory

fields.label: Least Concern, Extinct in the NT
fields.description: Species is least concern globally but extinct in the Northern Territory
